title: Update Content Security Policy to Allow Pendo Resources
description:
The site's Content Security Policy (CSP) was blocking Pendo resources (`cdn.pendo.io`, `app.pendo.io`), preventing the Pendo analytics and in-app guidance from loading.

### Blocked Resources
- `https://app.pendo.io` — blocked by `frame-src` directive
- `https://cdn.pendo.io/agent/releases/*/guide.css` — blocked by `style-src-elem` directive

### Fix
Add Pendo domains to the CSP allowlist under `script-src` and `default-src` directives.
acceptance_criteria: Pendo scripts load without CSP violations
Pendo in-app guides and analytics function correctly
CSP allowlist includes cdn.pendo.io and app.pendo.io in appropriate directives
implementation_notes: Added cdn.pendo.io and app.pendo.io to custom CSP under script-src and default-src directives. Deployed to staging for review.
comment_summary: Waqar added Pendo domains to CSP script-src and default-src directives and pushed to staging. Ryan confirmed it would be tested during the next production deployment.
